details.query: What is the SQL query to show all events that started in the last hour?
retrieved_contexts: SELECT * FROM events WHERE starts_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY starts_at DESC LIMIT 3
expected_contexts: SELECT id, title, starts_at, status, priority, subject_name   FROM events   WHERE starts_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';
details.ground_truth: SELECT id, title, starts_at, status, priority, subject_name   FROM events   WHERE starts_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';SELECT * FROM events   WHERE starts_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';

details.query: What is the SQL query for the details of event ID 'evt-a1b2c3d4'?
retrieved_contexts: SELECT * FROM events WHERE id = 'evt-a1b2c3d4'
expected_contexts: SELECT id, title, description, starts_at, updated_at, ends_at, status, priority, source, aggregation_key, finding_type, subject_type, subject_name, subject_namespace, subject_node, fingerprint, evidences, cloud_account_id   FROM events   WHERE id = 'evt-a1b2c3d4';
details.ground_truth: SELECT id, title, description, starts_at, updated_at, ends_at, status, priority, source, aggregation_key, finding_type, subject_type, subject_name, subject_namespace, subject_node, fingerprint, evidences, cloud_account_id   FROM events   WHERE id = 'evt-a1b2c3d4';SELECT * FROM events   WHERE id = 'evt-a1b2c3d4';
